extraction.one_line_summary: VALGREN Michael attacked decisively with kilometers remaining, using tactical nous and power to hold off the chase for his biggest career win.
tactical_patterns: VALGREN Michael's solo attack succeeded despite visible chase coordination, suggesting late-race positioning trumps raw pursuit power.
TRENTIN Matteo actively chased knowing VALGREN's capabilities from shared team history, revealing prior teammate knowledge influences chase commitment.
VANMARCKE Sep failed to animate despite home advantage, indicating his tactical passivity even in favorable circumstances.

rider_signals.VALGREN Michael: positive: executed audacious long-range move with sufficient power reserves to hold chasers
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: showed chase awareness and attempted pursuit despite ultimately failing
rider_signals.VANMARCKE Sep: negative: tactically passive finish despite being Belgian in home race with strong positioning
